import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext'; import { CATEGORIES, CONTRACTORS } from '../../data/mockData'; export default function CreateWOModal({ onClose }) { const { createWorkOrder, showToast } = useApp(); const [form, setForm] = useState({ title: '', category: 'Electrical', area: '', priority: 'Med', due: '', contractor: 'AlphaServ', description: '', slaHours: 24, workman: '—', supervisor: 'TBD', supervisorId: '', raisedBy: 'Client (Admin)', }); function set(field, value) { setForm(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: value })); } function handleSubmit() { if (!form.title.trim()) return alert('Title is required'); if (!form.area.trim()) return alert('Area is required'); createWorkOrder(form); showToast(`Work order created and assigned to ${form.contractor}`, 'success'); onClose(); } return (
e.target === e.currentTarget && onClose()}>

set('title', e.target.value)} />
